raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declarative statement of post-awakening commitment and service within a recovery program",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The listed steps produce a spiritual awakening",
    "A distinct actionable 'message' exists that can be carried to alcoholics",
    "The principles are applicable and beneficial in all areas of life",
    "The speaker(s) have experienced the awakening and are acting on it"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a causal sequence from awakening to outward action; assumes unstated prior steps without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The steps reliably produce positive change, the message aids recovery, and practicing the principles improves life outcomes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "No genuine awakening occurs from the steps, the message lacks efficacy or causes harm, or the principles prove inapplicable or counterproductive in daily affairs"
}
